rules.description: English acute crisis response for UAE

action.response_text: I'm really concerned about what you've shared. Please reach out for support now. In the UAE: National Mental Support Line 800-HOPE (800-4673) (free, 8am–8pm daily), or emergency services: 999. You don't have to face this alone.

resources.name: Sharjah Child & Youth Mental Health Helpline
Nearest hospital emergency department
resources.available: immediate danger or outside helpline hours

rules.description: English extended crisis resources for proactive queries

action.response_text:
Here are crisis and mental health resources in the UAE:
- National Mental Support Line: 800-HOPE (800-4673) (free, 8am–8pm daily)
- CDA Mental Health Support: 800 4888
- Emergency Services: 999
- Al Amal Psychiatric Hospital: in-person psychiatric support
- Lighthouse Arabia, Camali Clinic, American Center for Psychiatry and Neurology: therapy in Dubai

If you're in immediate danger, please call 999 or go to your nearest emergency room.

resources.name: American Center for Psychiatry and Neurology

rules.description: English post-crisis monitoring empty-reply fail-safe. Migrated from the _EMPTY_MONITORING_FALLBACK constant in output_gate.py into locale-selected crisis_content so it has a native ar_uae twin (CC-AR-002) and never rides translate-out. Wording is verbatim the live prod constant.

action.response_text: I'm still here with you. If things get harder, please reach out right now, the UAE National Mental Support Line on 800-HOPE (800-4673), or 999 for an emergency.
